Συνεργαζόμαστε με λίγους πελάτες κάθε φορά, ώστε να μιλάτε πάντα με το άτομο που ξέρει τον φάκελό σας.

Greek Golden Visa

EU residency, from €250,000AB İkamet İzni, 250.000€'dan itibaren欧盟居留权，起价25万欧元ΕΕ residency, από €250.000

The lowest investment threshold of any EU golden-visa programme — for the whole family, with no obligation to relocate.Herhangi bir AB altın vize programının en düşük yatırım eşiği — tüm aile için, taşınma zorunluluğu olmaksızın.欧盟黄金签证计划中门槛最低的项目——适用于全家，无需移居。Το χαμηλότερο όριο επένδυσης από κάθε golden-visa της ΕΕ — για όλη την οικογένεια, χωρίς υποχρέωση μετεγκατάστασης.

🇬🇷 Greek Golden Visa

Everything about the Greek Golden Visa

Europe’s most accessible residency-by-investment programme — a 5-year permit for you and your family, in one of the Mediterranean’s strongest property markets.

Check your eligibility

5 facts

What the Greek Golden Visa gives you

A residence permit granted to non-EU nationals who make a qualifying investment in Greece — most commonly in real estate. Governed by the Hellenic Republic under Law 4251/2014, as amended.

01.

Demand keeps climbing

Issuances to investors and their families have grown from a few hundred a year to tens of thousands — Greece is now the last major EU programme offering residency through real estate.

Greek Golden Visa — total issuances to investors and their families since 2014
Cumulative residence permits
7152014
 2015
 2016
 2017
 2018
 2019
 2020
 2021
 2022
 2023
48,0492024
79,0562025

By 2025, a +65% increase in the issuance of residence permits compared to 2024.

02.

Lowest entry threshold in the EU 🇪🇺

A minimum investment of €250,000 for commercial-to-residential conversions or the restoration of listed buildings — the lowest qualifying threshold of any golden-visa programme in the European Union.

03.

No relocation, no minimum stay

There is no requirement to live in Greece to keep the permit. It is valid for 5 years and renewable for as long as the investment is held.

04.

You can rent the property

You can lease your property on a long-term basis, creating a stable, passive income stream while you keep the Golden Visa.

Good to know: under current Greek law, Golden-Visa real estate may be let on long-term leases, but short-term (Airbnb-style) rentals are not permitted on properties used to qualify.

05.

Family inclusion — a 3-generation policy

A single investment covers the main applicant, their spouse (or registered partner), children up to 21 (or up to 24 in some cases), and the parents of both spouses.

Investment requirement

How much you need to invest

Since 1 September 2024, real-estate thresholds depend on the region. Conversion and restoration projects keep the €250,000 route open across the country.

€400,000
All other regions of Greece
  • Single residential property
  • Minimum 120 m² surface area
€250,000
Across all of Greece
  • Conversion from commercial / industrial to residential
  • Restoration of listed buildings
  • No surface-area requirement
€800,000
Attica (Athens), Thessaloniki, Mykonos, Santorini & islands with population > 3,100
  • Single residential property
  • Minimum 120 m² surface area

Greece ranks TOP 8 globally for wealth inflows

+24% increase in millionaire growth over the last decade (2014–2024).

Source: The Henley Private Wealth Migration Report 2025.

Sources & notes

Investment thresholds verified against current public guidance, e.g. Fragomen and Get Golden Visa. Permit-issuance figures and the “5 facts” are reproduced from the source presentation supplied to us; the 2025 figure shown is the full-year count (a mid-year 2025 figure of 61,460, +28% vs 2024, also appears in the same material). Wealth-inflow ranking: The Henley Private Wealth Migration Report 2025.

Disclaimer. This page is general information, not legal, tax or immigration advice. Golden-Visa thresholds, eligibility and rules are set by the Hellenic Republic and can change; confirm against official sources (Greek Ministry of Migration & Asylum / Enterprise Greece) and with a licensed adviser before any investment. 99 properties is a real-estate agency, not a law firm.
